name: ngrok
description: Ingress platform for exposing local services. Monitor tunnels and access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the ngrok Dashboard at https://dashboard.ngrok.com
2. Navigate to API section at https://dashboard.ngrok.com/api
3. Click "Add API Key" to generate a new API key
4. Copy the key and paste it below

Note: The API key is shown only once at creation. Store it securely.

checks.name: ngrok App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the ngrok API is accessible with the provided credentials.

checks.name: ngrok Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to ngrok via API.
